headline: Is Pool Corporation (POOL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is POOL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Pool Corporation on StockOpine’s Newsletter’s Substack by StockOpine. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on POOL. Pool Corporation’s share was trading at $234.22 as of April 22nd. POOL’s trailing and forward P/E were 21.49 and 21.19 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Pool (NASDAQ:POOL) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Swimming pool distributor Pool (NASDAQ:POOL) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6.2% year on year to $1.14 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.45 per share was 6.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Pool Corporation Reports First Quarter Results and Confirms Annual Earnings Guidance Range
summary: Q1 2026 Highlights: Net sales increased 6%, driven by strong maintenance product sales and improvement in discretionary categoriesGross margin of 29.0%, down 20 bps year-over-year, driven by increased early buy activity and seasonal mix in the first quarterOperating income increased 7% to $82.6 million; operating margin expanded 10 bps to 7.3%Diluted EPS of $1.45, an increase of 2%, or an increase of 8% without ASU 2016-09 tax benefitsConfirms annual earnings guidance range of $10.87 - $11.17 pe
